case_title: THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES et al VS. CAILIN CONSTRUCTION, INC. et al

calendar.matters:
(Renotice) Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arb Awards
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR, CARPENTERS PENSION, CARPENTERS ANNUITY, CARPENTERS TRAINING, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL (Renotice) Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Awards is granted. No opposition filed. The Court will sign order submitted via email by counsel. Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

****After hearing, the court signs order confirming arbitration award****

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-17-2012 Off Calendar
